name: trusted-multi-agent-infrastructure-site
description: Bilingual, agent-readable public portal for Trusted Multi-Agent Infrastructure.

scripts.build: npm run clean && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log vinext build
scripts.release:static: npm run export && npm run verify:static
scripts.release:formal: RELEASE_MODE=formal RELEASE_DECISION_REF=architecture/ADR-022-developer-preview-release.md RELEASED_BY_REF=zhangbin PUBLIC_RELEASE_TAG=v0.1-developer-preview DBOS_WHEEL_URL=https://github.com/joy7758/digital-biosphere-architecture-specification/releases/download/v0.1-developer-preview/digital_biosphere_os_preview-0.1.0.dev0-py3-none-any.whl npm run release:static
scripts.test: npm run build && RELEASE_MODE=formal RELEASE_DECISION_REF=architecture/ADR-022-developer-preview-release.md RELEASED_BY_REF=zhangbin PUBLIC_RELEASE_TAG=v0.1-developer-preview DBOS_WHEEL_URL=https://github.com/joy7758/digital-biosphere-architecture-specification/releases/download/v0.1-developer-preview/digital_biosphere_os_preview-0.1.0.dev0-py3-none-any.whl node --test tests/*.test.mjs
